title: Feedback button can submit an enclosing form

evidence.quote:
<button
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
        aria-label={t("button")}
        className="fixed bottom-6 left-6 z-40 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/10

reasoning: The component renders a native <button> without an explicit type. In HTML, a button defaults to type="submit" when it is inside a form, so placing this reusable fixed feedback control under a form subtree would submit that form while opening the modal. This is an avoidable correctness issue for a UI component that is not intended to submit data.
reproduction: Render <FeedbackButton /> inside a <form onSubmit={...}> and click it; the form submit handler runs in addition to opening the feedback modal.
recommendation: Set type="button" on the feedback trigger button.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests are included for this component, and no test script is declared in the provided package manifest.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a component test that renders FeedbackButton inside a form, clicks it, and asserts the form submit handler is not called while the modal open path is triggered.
minimumFixScope: Update frontend/src/components/feedback-button.tsx to add type="button" to the trigger.
